# kemp_owasp_custom_data (Data Source)

Looks up a custom OWASP data file (word/IP list) stored on the LoadMaster by filename.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_owasp_custom_data" "existing" {
  filename = "owasp_cust.data"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filename` (String) Filename of the OWASP custom data file (e.g. `owasp_cust.data`).
